positive: A whimsical, hand-drawn illustration of a bioluminescent forest at twilight. Giant glowing mushrooms, friendly woodland creatures (foxes, owls), and a winding path illuminated by soft, magical light. Style of Studio Ghibli meets modern botanical art, highly detailed, vibrant colors, storybook quality.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, poorly rendered hands, grayscale, sketch, photograph
